overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, beginning inside a neon-lit food stall and proceeding through a covered walkway into a vibrant pedestrian street with reflective wet pavement. The scene features heavy neon lighting in pink, green, and blue hues, with diverse NPCs populating the urban environment.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens inside a narrow cyberpunk food stall with teal and green neon lighting. The camera moves forward past white bar stools where patrons sit eating, approaching a metal gate exit at the far end.

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the food stall through a teal metal gate into a covered pedestrian walkway. The wet pavement reflects vibrant pink and purple neon from a modern glass building on the right, while palm trees line the left side beneath an overhead pedestrian bridge.

segments.scene_description: Walking along a bustling pedestrian street lined with a reflective glass building on the right emitting pink neon light. The wet pavement mirrors the vibrant colors while diverse NPCs walk in various directions, and digital billboards illuminate the left side.

scene_state.functional_zone: darker commercial street approaching building entrance

approaching well-lit building entrance with vending machines

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions to a darker area with green-lit storefronts on the left and a building entrance ahead. The camera approaches glass doors flanked by illuminated vending machines on the right, with the environment becoming quieter and less crowded than the vibrant neon section.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the intimate interior of a neon-lit food stall out into a sprawling, vibrant cyberpunk pedestrian street. It begins inside a narrow stall bathed in teal and green light, moving past white bar stools and patrons toward a metal gate exit. As the camera passes through the gate, the environment opens into a covered walkway where the lighting shifts to vivid pinks and purples reflecting off wet pavement, flanked by palm trees and an overhead bridge. The scene then expands further into a bustling urban thoroughfare, with the reflective glass of a modern building on the right and glowing digital billboards on the left. Finally, the camera glides through the crowd of diverse NPCs, fully immersed in the saturated glow of the city's nightlife.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a vibrant urban center into a quieter, more secluded corridor of the city. It begins by moving away from the crowded neon districts and into a darker area characterized by green-lit storefronts lining the left side. As the camera advances, the surrounding noise fades and the crowd thins, shifting the mood toward a more sterile atmosphere. The scene then closes in on a building entrance, gliding past illuminated vending machines on the right before finally approaching a set of glass doors.
